sections.paragraph:
μυλικός, ή, όν (μύλη ‘mill’; schol. on Eur., Hecuba 362; Syntipas p. 108, 11) belonging to a mill λίθος μ. millstone Mk 9:42 v.l. (for μῦλος ὀνικός); Lk 17:2 (on both s. λίθος 2c and ὀνικός); Rv 18:21 v.l.—DELG s.v. μύλη C.

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Syntipas Syntipas , a collection of fables under the name of Syntapis; before XI a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 660
